label: Pead Earnings Drift
signal: Long the top-quartile SUE after earnings; 1-month hold.
description: Long top-quartile SUE (standardized unexpected earnings: (EPS − EPS_lag4)/8q-rolling-std) after announcements, 1-month hold, S&P 500 universe via CRSP+CCM. 5bps/side.
reference: Ball & Brown (1968); Bernard & Thomas (1989) — post-earnings-announcement drift
